checkout.approximateHint: Approximate total. The exact amount will be calculated in the next step.
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.metaDescription: Find answers to common questions about our products, shipping, returns, and more.
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions
faq.contactHint: Can't find what you're looking for?
faq.a1: Standard shipping takes 2-5 business days depending on your location. Express shipping is available for next-day delivery in select areas.
faq.a2: We accept returns within 14 days of delivery. Items must be in original condition with packaging. Contact us to initiate a return.
faq.q3: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a3: We accept credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard), Apple Pay, Google Pay, bank transfer, cash on delivery, and WhatsApp orders depending on your region.
faq.q4: How can I track my order?
faq.a4: Once your order ships, you'll receive a tracking number via email. You can also check your order status in your account dashboard.
faq.a5: Yes! You can reach us via WhatsApp, email, or through the contact form on our website. We typically respond within 24 hours.
faq.a6: All our products come with a quality guarantee. If you receive a defective item, we'll replace it or issue a full refund.
about.title: About Us
about.metaDescription: Learn more about our story, values, and commitment to quality.
about.intro: We're passionate about delivering the best products and customer experience.
about.story1: We started with a simple idea: make quality products accessible to everyone. What began as a small local shop has grown into a trusted online store.
about.story2: Today, we serve customers across the region with the same dedication to quality and service that inspired us from day one.
about.value1Desc: Every decision we make puts our customers at the center.
about.value2Desc: We carefully select every product to ensure the highest standards.
about.value3Desc: We work hard to get your orders to you as quickly as possible.
about.value4Desc: We're proud to be part of our local community.
about.contactHint: Want to learn more about us?
returnPolicy.title: Returns & Refunds
returnPolicy.metaDescription: Learn about our return policy, process, and conditions for refunds.
returnPolicy.subtitle: We want you to be completely satisfied with your purchase
returnPolicy.summaryText: You can return most items within 14 days of delivery for a full refund. Items must be unused and in their original packaging.
returnPolicy.step1Desc: Contact us within 14 days of receiving your order via WhatsApp or your account dashboard.
returnPolicy.step2Desc: Pack the item securely in its original packaging and send it back to us.
returnPolicy.step3Desc: Once we receive and inspect the item, we'll process your refund within 5 business days.
returnPolicy.condition1: Items must be returned within 14 days of delivery
returnPolicy.condition2: Items must be unused and in original packaging
returnPolicy.condition3: Perishable goods and custom-made items cannot be returned
